_README.description: Model metadata for native MiniMax API access.
_README.endpoint: https://api.minimax.io/v1 (OpenAI-compatible). For users in China use https://api.minimaxi.com/v1 via MINIMAX_API_BASE_URL.

models.description: MiniMax-M3 (1M context, 128K output) - Released 2026-06-01. MiniMax Sparse Attention (MSA), ~1/20 Compute-Kosten bei 1M Kontext. Multimodal (Text/Bild/Video-Input → Text). SWE-Bench Pro 59% (über GPT-5.5 und Gemini 3.1 Pro). Frontier coding, tool use, long-horizon agentic.
MiniMax-M2.7 (204.8K context, 131K output) - Released 2026-03-18. Sparse MoE (230B total / 10B active). Strong coding, tool use, multi-turn reasoning. Text-only.
